name: devspec-autopilot
description: Automatically pick up staged action items from DevSpec, implement them, test them, and push to a target branch. Includes /devspec.remote for Agents-page remote control.

devspec_token.title: DevSpec API token
devspec_token.description: Your DevSpec API token with read_write scope. Generate one in DevSpec under Settings → API. It starts with 'dvs_'.
